questions.question: How much of the year does the prohibition of gas leaf blowers last? What date in the year does it start, and what date does it end?
questions.answer: The prohibition of gas leaf blowers lasts from June 1 to September 30 each year. During this period, leaf blowers cannot be operated at all in the City of New Rochelle.

questions.question: What are the permitted hours for gas leaf blower operation?
questions.answer: Gas leaf blowers can be operated from October 1 to May 31. During this period, the permitted hours are weekdays from 8:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m., and on Saturdays and Sundays from 10:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m.
